rules.rule_text:
rule JavaDropper
{
	meta:
		author = " Kevin Breen <kevin@techanarchy.net>"
		date = "2015/10"
		ref = "http://malwareconfig.com/stats/AlienSpy"
		maltype = "Remote Access Trojan"
		filetype = "exe"

	strings:
		$jar = "META-INF/MANIFEST.MF"
		$a1 = "ePK"
		$a2 = "kPK"
		$b1 = "config.ini"
		$b2 = "password.ini"
		$c1 = "stub/stub.dll"
		$d1 = "c.dat"

	condition:
		$jar and ( all of ( $a* ) or all of ( $b* ) or all of ( $c* ) or all of ( $d* ) )
}
